name: Data Table
purpose: Structured tabular view for tasks, sources, model runs, or evaluation results.

structures.name: Basic Table
structures.notes: The default management table for dashboard surfaces.

structures.name: Metric Table
structures.notes: Used when comparing usage or model performance.

structures.name: Selectable Table
structures.notes: Supports batch operations without adding visual weight.

interactionNotes: Borders and row backgrounds should create structure; avoid heavy zebra treatments.
Status chips can borrow chart or accent tokens for softer categorization.
